title: Add `podman machine restart` command
body:
### Feature request description

We have the ability to restart pods and containers, but not machines - which is worth fixing.

### Suggest potential solution

Add a new command, `podman machine restart`, that shuts down and then starts again a given `podman machine` VM

### Have you considered any alternatives?

Using `podman machine stop` and `podman machine start` separately

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: @Lumexralph are you actively working on this? If not I am interested in picking it up
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
hi @Lumexralph and @Jessicaward - i'd like to submit a PR for this issue unless either of you still wish to work on this.
